ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of A Final Inventory And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-21-2014 Continued To Mar-25-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Mayo for Christina Chow (Former Administrator).

Ms. Mayo stated that they filed a request for dismissal and that there were no assets. The Court informed Counsel that a petition to terminate estate administration needs to be filed. Status of filing of a final inventory and petition for final distribution was continued to March 25, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
